title: Indulgent Australian Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and exotic Australian-inspired dish featuring tender lamb, aromatic spices, and sweet floral notes.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ground lamb and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the allspice, cinnamon, ginger, and coriander, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced apple, red wine, beef broth, and honey, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in some chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro, and serve over couscous or rice.
Garnish with additional herbs and serve immediately.
Serve with warm pita bread or flatbread for a truly indulgent experience.
